underlying_goal: Optimize Arrow class hierarchy performance in audio render block by eliminating ARC retain/release overhead
friction_detail: Unmanaged pointer optimization caused EXC_BAD_ACCESS crash when mutable arrow properties changed at runtime, and Solution 3 was incompatible with user's runtime JSON composition and mutable reference architecture.
brief_summary: User wanted to reduce CPU overhead from ARC retain/release in audio render block; Claude implemented Unmanaged optimizations but hit a crash bug, then pivoted to exploring alternative solutions and providing learning resources.
